notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Ketel Marte out at 2nd. Corbin Carroll out at 1st.
